series_metadata.series_title: DEALERS OF INTANGIBLES TAX RETURN AND AUDITS
series_metadata.series_description: Dealer Intangible tax returns (Form 980) and all supplemental schedules (true value computations, schedule A-allocation of gross receipts, and analysis of invesment account), assessment certificates, audit work papers, incluidng audit reports, related documents and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 5 yrs from date of preliminary, amended or corrected assessment ; Electronic: 5 yrs from date of preliminary, amended or corrected assessment
